title: Hemipilia dolichocentra
intro: Hemipilia dolichocentra is a type of orchid plant, specifically a species within the Hemipilia genus. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Hemipilia dolichocentra include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, this plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to support overall health and well-being.
taxonomy: Hemipilia dolichocentra is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This family encompasses a vast array of flowering plants, with over 30,000 known species. Hemipilia dolichocentra is further classified within the subfamily Orchidoideae, which consists of terrestrial orchids. Within the genus Hemipilia, Hemipilia dolichocentra is one of several species of orchids that are native to specific regions.
